title: blocking a broad update
lines: error: Broad package updates are blocked. Run the command with explicit package specs so each update can be staged and analyzed first.
plain:
$ bun update
[0m[31m[1;38;2;248;113;113merror:[0m [38;2;228;228;231mBroad package updates are blocked. Run the command with explicit package specs so each update can be staged and analyzed first.[0m[0m
